title: Food Allergies e-Notice - Canada.ca
content:
## Food Allergies e-Notice
Join Health Canada's Food Allergies e-Notice, a free service to stay on top of issued advice as well as regulatory and scientific developments in the area of food allergens and intolerances in Canada.
Consumers, health professionals, as well as the food industry, can subscribe to Food Allergies e-Notice. You will receive the latest food allergies developments as they are issued by Health Canada. With the current amendments taking place to the Food and Drug Regulations, these updates should help keep key stakeholders and Canadians current with our progress. We encourage you to share this address with your colleagues.
This tool is provided as an information dissemination service only. Health Canada will not assume responsibility for any system failures or omissions of notifications.
Visit the Food Allergies and Intolerances webpage to view the complete list of topics related to this subject.

## Subscribe to Food Allergies e-Notice
To subscribe, submit an email to fa-subscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca with the email subject containing only the text " Subscribe ".
You will receive a confirmation e-mail from Food Allergies e-Notice. You must reply to this confirmation e-mail in order to activate your e-Notice subscription.

## Cancel your Food Allergies e-Notice Subscription
If you are already a subscriber and wish to cancel, submit an email to fa-unsubscribe-request@list.hc-sc.gc.ca with the email subject containing only the text " Unsubscribe ".
You will receive a confirmation e-mail from Food Allergies e-Notice.
Note : If you're having problems subscribing or unsubscribing, contact bcs-bipc@hc-sc.gc.ca .
